description: A guest's current stay qualifies them to be upgraded to the next tier in the loyalty program.

nodes.task_description: During the night audit, the system automatically identifies members who have met the criteria for a tier upgrade.

expected_outcome.value: The system flags a guest for upgrade.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically updates the member's status to the new, higher tier.

expected_outcome.value: The guest's profile is updated to the 'Gold' tier.

nodes.task_description: The system sends an automated congratulations email to the guest, outlining their new benefits.

expected_outcome.value: A notification email is sent to the guest.
